_comment: LinkCage user config. Copy this to ~/.linkcage/config.json (Mac/Linux) or %LOCALAPPDATA%/LinkCage/config.json (Windows) and edit. Nothing here is required — LinkCage works out of the box with zero configuration.
_comment_debug: Enable debug logging. Writes to ~/.linkcage/linkcage-debug.log (Mac/Linux) or %LOCALAPPDATA%/LinkCage/linkcage-debug.log (Windows). Contains URLs you open — disable for privacy. Only enable when troubleshooting.

verdict._comment: URL reputation check settings. Disable with enabled:false if you want pure sandbox only.
verdict._comment_cache: When true, verdict results are stored in a local SQLite database (cache.sqlite). This speeds up repeat checks but creates a local history of every URL you sandboxed. Set to false for maximum privacy — each click will re-check the URL from scratch (slightly slower).

urlhaus._comment: URLhaus malware feed from abuse.ch. No API key required. Free, CC0 licensed.

gsb._comment: Google Safe Browsing v4 Lookup API. Optional upgrade. Get a free key at https://console.cloud.google.com — create a project, enable the Safe Browsing API, create an API key, and paste it below. Non-commercial use only per Google's TOS.
